info.title: Azure APi Management api importer tool
info.description: A tool to update an api hosted in Azure API management that uses Azure.Identity to authenticate to Azure and the Azure.ResourceManager.ApiManagement SDK, the intended usage is for CI/CD e.g. with GitHub Actions

commands.name: update
commands.description: Updates the api of an API Management Instance

options.name: --api-name
options.description: The name of the api

options.name: --spec-url
options.description: The path of the specification

options.name: --svc
options.description: The URI of the downstream service

options.name: --debug
options.description: Enables detailed logging

options.name: --retry
options.description: The number of times to retry, max allowed valus is 10

options.name: --service
options.description: The name of the API Management service, if null it will pick the only one present in the selected subscription

options.name: --spec-format
options.description: The type of the specification, one of (GraphQL, OpenApi, OpenApiJson, Swagger, Wadl, Wsdl)

options.name: --sub-id
options.description: The id of the subscription, if null will use the default subscription of the logged in session

options.name: --sub-name
options.description: The Name of the subscription, used to find the most suitable subscription if more than one are found

options.name: --api-name
